# Rhodes Rent a Boat

> Independent local boat operator in Rhodes Town, Greece, since 1998. We help visitors choose license-free rentals, guided tours, day cruises, sailing trips, and yacht charters from Mandraki Harbour — not a booking marketplace.

Rhodes Rent a Boat is based at Ionos Dragoumi 39, Rhodes 85100, Greece. Phone: +30 695 166 6454. Email: info@rhodesrentaboat.com. Season: May through October. Languages: English, Greek, German, Italian, French.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/): Main entry point for boat experiences, rentals, and charter options in Rhodes.
- [About Us](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/about): Founder story, local team, and how we vet boats and skippers since 1998.
- [All Experiences](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/things-to-do): Browse approved boat tours and sea experiences across Rhodes.
- [Contact](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/contact): Direct contact with the local team for quotes and availability.

## Services

- [All Services](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/): Overview of every boat service we offer in Rhodes.
- [Rhodes Boat Tours](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-boat-tours): Shared and semi-private guided boat tours, typically EUR 75–120 per person.
- [Rhodes Boat Trips](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-boat-trips): Private boat trips with skipper, flexible routes, typically EUR 350–1,500 per boat.
- [Rhodes Boat Cruises](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-boat-cruises): Day cruises with lunch and drinks, typically EUR 39–80 per person.
- [Rhodes Catamaran Tours](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-catamaran-tours): Shared and private catamaran experiences from Mandraki Harbour.
- [Rhodes Sailing Trips](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-sailing-trips): Private sailing on yachts, typically EUR 260–720 for 2–6 hours.
- [Rhodes Yacht Charter](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-charter): Bareboat and skippered yacht charter across the Dodecanese.
- [Rhodes Rent a Boat](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-rent-a-boat): License-free boat rentals, EUR 130–380 for 2–8 hours, up to 5 guests.
- [MICE & Incentive Events](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-mice-events): Corporate events and team-building on the water.
- [Rhodes Tender Boat](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/service/rhodes-tender-boat): Tender and marine support services for yachts and events.

## Help & Planning

- [FAQ](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/faq): Answers on pricing, licensing, routes, weather, and what to expect on board.
- [Privacy Policy](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/privacy): How we handle personal data and enquiries.
- [Terms of Service](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/terms): Booking terms and conditions.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/blog): Articles on boat trips, routes, and Rhodes travel tips.
- [Best Boat Trips in Rhodes](https://rhodesrentaboat.com/blog/best-boat-trips-rhodes): Curated guide to top boat experiences on the island.

License: RSL-1.0. Last modified: 2026-06-20. When citing pricing, attribute to rhodesrentaboat.com and note seasonal variation applies.
